metadata.purpose: Replay fixed V4.1 qualitative beta risk-budget rules on historical states and audit contradictions.

summary.key_read: Replay produced 140 policy states; dominant posture is balanced (135/140). no hard contradictions were found, but 4 soft review items need human evaluation.

review_items.note: This is a soft validation review item, not an automatic rule change.

checks: high offensive budget before negative forward validation window
over-defensive budget before positive forward validation window
weak structure with high offensive budget
high theme risk without defensive floor

known_limitations: Historical style context before structural hazard coverage can miss trend/breadth/liquidity fields.
Market return is used only to audit policy contradictions after signal generation.
The V4.1 policy rules are replayed as-is; this artifact does not tune thresholds.
